headline: Tesla’s revenues are bouncing back, but profits are still weak
summary: Tesla's revenues show recovery after two challenging years. Despite improved delivery reports, Q2 2026 profits remain low. The company continues its uphill battle towards full financial health.

headline: Price-hiked iPads are a little cheaper right now
summary: Apple products recently saw price increases, but deals are emerging. The 13-inch iPad Pro M5 (512GB) is currently $150 off at Amazon. This offers a chance to save on a high-end iPad model.

headline: iOS code could reportedly let Apple cut off apps when users miss iPhone payments
summary: iOS 27 beta code hints Apple might introduce a 'Restricted Mode' for financed iPhones. This mode could disable apps if users miss payments. The feature aligns with reports of a new 'Apple Upgrade' financing program.

headline: Apple is reportedly testing a MacBook Neo with more RAM
summary: Apple is rumored to be developing an updated MacBook Neo. The new version will feature an improved processor and increased memory. Future plans also include refreshing the model with new color options.

headline: Best Buy's Trio of Exclusive Limited Edition Xbox Elite Series 2 Core Controllers Are on Sale Today
summary: Exclusive Limited Edition Xbox Elite Series 2 Core Controllers are currently on sale. These controllers are available at Best Buy. They come preconfigured using Xbox's Design Lab service.

headline: Walmart Has the Best Prices on Both 512GB and 256GB Nintendo Switch 2 Memory Cards Amidst Price Hikes
summary: Walmart offers the best prices on Nintendo Switch 2 memory cards. Deals are available for both 512GB and 256GB capacities. Secure essential storage for your console despite recent price increases.

headline: Save $600 Off the Skytech Shadow RTX 5060 Ti 16GB Gaming PC, Now Just $1,399 With Free Shipping
summary: Save $600 on the Skytech Shadow RTX 5060 Ti 16GB Gaming PC. It's now available for $1,399 with free shipping. This prebuilt system is excellent for 1080p and 1440p gaming.

headline: Preorder a New Samsung Galaxy Z Device, and Get Up to a $350 Amazon Gift Card for Free
summary: Preorders are now live for the new Samsung Galaxy Z Folding Android phones. Get up to a $350 Amazon Gift Card for free with your preorder. Secure the latest foldable tech with a valuable bonus.

headline: PC Harper's widow criticises early prisoner release plan as Burnham to review scheme
summary: Lissie Harper has strongly criticized the potential early release of prisoners. Her comments follow reports that two of PC Harper's killers could be freed early. Andy Burnham is scheduled to review the controversial early release scheme.

headline: Most bus fares in England to be capped at £2 from January
summary: Most bus fares across England will be capped at £2 starting January. The government policy aims to alleviate cost of living pressures. It is intended to provide financial breathing room for commuters.

headline: Ukrainian drones hit Russian online giant retailer Wildberries for second time
summary: Ukrainian drones have struck Russian online retailer Wildberries for a second time. Logistics hubs in the Krasnodar and Stavropol regions were hit overnight. This marks another attack on the prominent Russian company's infrastructure.

headline: Ex-Southern Water boss among four charged over alleged plan to manipulate water quality tests
summary: Former Southern Water CEO Matthew Wright and three others face charges. They are accused of a scheme to manipulate water quality tests. The alleged plan aimed to save the company millions in penalties.
